allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\(\(Resolve-Path 'public/BLUE VECTOR logo_word.png'\)\); $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap $img; $w = $bmp.Width; $h = $bmp.Height; $minX=$w; $minY=$h; $maxX=0; $maxY=0; for \($y=0; $y -lt $h; $y+=2\) { for \($x=0; $x -lt $w; $x+=2\) { if \($bmp.GetPixel\($x,$y\).A -gt 10\) { if \($x -lt $minX\){$minX=$x}; if \($x -gt $maxX\){$maxX=$x}; if \($y -lt $minY\){$minY=$y}; if \($y -gt $maxY\){$maxY=$y} } } }; "size: $w x $h"; "bbox: L=$minX T=$minY R=$maxX B=$maxY"; "content: w=$\($maxX-$minX\) h=$\($maxY-$minY\)"; "left-pad-frac: $\([math]::Round\($minX/$w,3\)\) right-pad-frac: $\([math]::Round\(\($w-$maxX\)/$w,3\)\)"; "top-pad-frac: $\([math]::Round\($minY/$h,3\)\) bottom-pad-frac: $\([math]::Round\(\($h-$maxY\)/$h,3\)\)"; $img.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\))
